title: Engin Üstün
text: Home * People * Engin Üstün Engin Üstün Engin Üstün , a Turkish German Webmaster [1] and computer chess programmer. In 1995 he started chess programming, began to learn the C programming language to write the engine EnginMax using the Chess Engine Communication Protocol and later UCI . In 2004, he started to write his new UCI engine Tornado from scratch, which is based on bitboards .
